title: Smart Cyberpunk Radio
description: Concept design for a cyberpunk-inspired radio that combines retro aesthetics with modern technology. The radio features a sleek and futuristic design, with neon accents and a compact form factor. It incorporates advanced features such as Bluetooth connectivity, voice control, and a digital display for tuning and information. The radio is designed to be portable and user-friendly, making it perfect for music lovers who want to enjoy their favorite tunes on the go while embracing the cyberpunk style.
